name: OneMeta Inc.
business: OneMeta Inc. develops and markets artificial intelligence products that eliminate language barriers in daily communications by providing interpretation and translation services using natural language processing (NLP) technology. Its VerbumSuite platform supports real-time conversations, virtual meetings, and online chats in over 140 languages. The company serves organizations, educational institutions, and customer service centers.

exposures.sentence: We develop and market artificial intelligence products that eliminate language barriers in daily communications by providing high-quality, accurate, and efficient interpretation and translation services using natural language processing (NLP) technology.
